shared_context.goal: Fetch and delete duplicate Loosefruit PR_LOOSEFRUIT transactions where DocID contains underscore, across all locations, with improved Duplicate Cleanup layout.
shared_context.source_query: SELECT TOP (1000) ... FROM [db_ptrj].[dbo].[PR_LOOSEFRUIT] WHERE [DocID] LIKE '%[_]%' ORDER BY [DocID]
shared_context.delete_strategy: Query Gateway SELECT for targets, existing Plantware browser runner for deletion
shared_context.all_location_strategy: Empty LocCode fetches all locations; runner groups selected targets by LocCode and processes each group with its saved session.

risk_notes: Existing app/core/loosefruit_gateway.py appears incomplete and must be fixed before import.
Existing task_register_gateway.py already contains Loosefruit classes, so implementation must avoid duplicate ownership drift.
Current delete-loosefruit runner rejects multiple LocCodes; all-location support is required.
